  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    HtmlDialog
    Dialog that displays an HTML document.
    HtmlFactory
    Utility class to generate HTML tables for UI purposes.
    IndexFactory
    Simple counter to produce a sequence of numbers.
    PanZoomImageView
    A simple image view that may be panned and zoomed by the user.
    PreviewDialog
    Dialog that displays a rendering of the dependency graph.
    RuleStatisticsDialog
    Dialog that displays the results of the dependency analysis algorithm.
    ShowCreatedByAction
    Context menu action to select the proof step that created a formula.
    ShowGraphAction
    Context menu action to display the dependency graph "around" a formula.
    ShowNodeInfoAction
    Context menu action to show information on a dependency graph node (incoming / outgoing edges).
    SliceToFixedPointDialog
    Dialog to monitor slicing progress.
    SlicingLeftPanel
    Panel of the proof slicing extension.
